'''Malric Blaene''' was a squat, balding male who was a seasoned bartender of the [[Lost Loves Casino]] located on [[Phyrstal Island]] in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Being a large gossip, he knew a great deal of questionable information on the rivalry of [[A'jidre Skrigatov]] and [[Malkoi]].

{{Char-stub}}
